case_title: JAMES A WHITE VS. HRB TAX GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, JAMES A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP, INC. $438.78 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $503.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,757.00 FILED BY WHITE, JAMES A AS TO DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, JAMES A AS TO DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SHARON DEGENER, DISTRICT GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2022 - CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JAMES A. WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP, INC. REPRESENTED BY SHARON DEGENER, DISTRICT GENERAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. MS. DEGENER PROVIDES THE COURT WITH AN ADDRESS FOR NOTICE PURPOSES. IJS IS UPDATED. CASE FILE IS PLACED IN TICKLER FILE IN D.506. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE** SERVED FEB-14-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP, INC.
REMARK: SHARON DEGENER, DISTRICT GENERAL MANAGER FOR HRB TAX GROUP, INC. ADDED TO IJS FOR NOTICE PURPOSES ONLY.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JAMES A. WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HRB TAX GROUP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SHARON DEGENER, DISTRICT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
